summary: Incredible audience recording that captures a mesmerizing free‑form jam with crystal‑clear sound and an inspired performance.
review: Listeners rave about the astonishing clarity of this FLAC24 capture, noting that even typical audience chatter disappears when the band dives into the extended improvisation. The free‑form jam, which builds to a second‑gear climax around the eleven‑minute mark, is highlighted as the show’s standout moment.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are highly favorable (4–5 stars) and praise both the audio fidelity and the jam performance; with only a few brief comments, confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the sound as "incredible" and note that audience clapping fades during the jam, indicating a clean mix with minimal distraction.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set builds into an extended free‑form improvisation that intensifies around the 11‑minute mark, delivering a high‑energy peak for the audience.
